intended_use: TruPlan enables visualization and measurement of structures of the heart and vessels for: • Pre-procedural planning and sizing for the left atrial appendage closure (LAAC) procedure • Post-procedural
intended_use_full: TruPlan enables visualization and measurement of structures of the heart and vessels for: • Pre-procedural planning and sizing for the left atrial appendage closure (LAAC) procedure • Post-procedural evaluation for the LAAC procedure
target_condition: Left atrial appendage (LAA) requiring closure procedure (LAAC)
ground_truth: For Left Heart Segmentation: manually annotated left heart structures by multiple expert readers. For Landing Zone Detection: manually contoured landing zone by multiple expert readers.
other_metrics: Left Heart Segmentation: bone removal in 532/533 cases (99.81%); LAA correctly visualized in 519/533 cases (97.37%). Landing Zone Detection: landing zone plane distance within 10 mm in 97/100 cases (97%) with mean distance of 3.87 mm; landing zone contour center distance within 12 mm in 99/100 cases (99%) with mean distance of 2.92 mm.
